retry_reason: release_firmware is void and NULL-safe; no failure return to check, and retrying would be redundant or dangerous (double-release risk).
contract_summary: This function releases all firmware references acquired during driver initialization. It iterates over the MAX_FW_IMAGES firmware image slots and calls release_firmware on both the binary and header pointers. The function does not return a value and is typically called during driver teardown or error cleanup. Caller must ensure the wl structure is valid and that firmware pointers have been properly obtained beforehand. After the call, all firmware references are released and must not be used. The function is NULL-safe, so it is safe to call even if some pointers are NULL.
